review_questions: Do final manifest, hash index, and reference index exactly match deterministic compiler output?
Do final review artifacts recompute and bind upstream hashes to current source, compiler, and final artifact files?
Does final review target bind the final subject hash without self-including target or decision artifacts?
Does final review decision bind that hash, have zero open blockers, and keep required review-decision contract fields?
Does end-to-end validation pass and cover final review binding?
Does build lock readiness cover fixture, test, and P2 implementation code candidates while remaining evidence-only?
Does P2-IMPL-05 avoid writing control/locks/P2_BUILD_LOCK.json, repository/src changes, or P1 paths?
